metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Idol, Poolside - Eyes Without A Face (Poolside Remix).flac
metadata.file_name: Billy Idol, Poolside - Eyes Without A Face (Poolside Remix).flac
metadata.title: Eyes Without A Face (Poolside Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.52] Les yeux sans visage
[00:23.31] 
[00:44.67] I'm all out of hope
[00:48.69] One more bad dream
[00:51.89] Could bring a fall
[00:55.89] When I'm far from home
[00:59.52] Don't call me on the phone
[01:02.53] To tell me you're alone
[01:06.68] It's easy to deceive
[01:10.85] It's easy to tease
[01:13.54] But hard to get release
[01:17.80] (Les yeux sans visage)
[01:22.19] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[01:27.82] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[01:33.38] Eyes without a face
[01:36.05] Got no human grace
[01:38.12] You're eyes without a face
[01:43.39] 
[01:53.35] 
[02:03.11] I spend so much time
[02:06.92] Believing all the lies
[02:09.69] To keep the dream alive
[02:13.87] Now it makes me sad
[02:17.85] It makes me mad at truth
[02:20.64] For loving what was you
[02:25.01] (Les yeux sans visage)
[02:29.15] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[02:34.80] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[02:40.38] Eyes without a face
[02:43.27] Got no human grace
[02:45.68] You're eyes without a face
[02:50.14] 
[03:09.24] When you hear the music, you make a dip
[03:12.08] Into someone else's pocket then make a slip
[03:22.84] 
[03:32.12] I'm on a bus on a psychedelic trip
[03:34.55] Reading murder books, trying to stay hip
[03:39.04] 
[03:41.46] Say your prayers
[04:05.51] Now I close my eyes
[04:09.65] And I wonder why
[04:12.85] I don't despise
[04:16.63] Now all I can do
[04:20.98] Love what was once
[04:23.54] So alive and new
[04:26.69] But it's gone from your eyes
[04:29.62] I'd better realise
[04:33.54] (Les yeux sans visage)
[04:37.59] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[04:43.15] Eyes without a face (les yeux sans visage)
[04:48.93] Eyes without a face
[04:51.43] Got no human grace
[04:54.18] You're eyes without a face
[04:57.06] Such a human waste
[04:59.65] You're eyes without a face
[05:03.93] 
[05:06.88] Les yeux sans visage
[05:18.03] Les yeux sans visage
[05:37.41]
